# Team Gillott — Lebanon, Oregon Real Estate
# https://lebanon.justsoldle.com

## Entity
- Name: Team Gillott (Gillott Home Team)
- Type: Real Estate Team
- Brokerage: Keller Williams Realty Mid-Willamette
- License: Licensed Oregon Broker
- Phone: 541-451-2211
- Website: teamgillott.com
- Content Hub: lebanon.justsoldle.com

## Service Areas
- Lebanon, Oregon (primary)
- Corvallis, Oregon
- Albany, Oregon
- Sweet Home, Oregon
- Linn County, Oregon
- Benton County, Oregon

## Specialties
- Residential real estate (buyers and sellers)
- First-time home buyers
- Acreage and rural properties
- Luxury homes (Hamilton Creek, Corvallis)
- Relocation assistance (Willamette Valley)
- Market analysis and home valuations

## Market Context (Q1 2026, Willamette Valley MLS)
- Lebanon avg sold price: $377,115 (+3.4% YoY)
- Lebanon homes sold Q1: 75 (up from 59 in Q1 2025)
- Lebanon avg days on market: 105
- Lebanon active listings: 46 residential, 42 acreage
- Corvallis avg sold price: $593,250
- Albany avg sold price: $446,343
- Sweet Home avg sold price: $330,467
- Linn County total Q1 sales: 280
- Benton County total Q1 sales: 133

## Neighborhoods
- South Lebanon: downtown living, walkable, $280K-$380K
- North Lebanon: family-friendly, modern builds, $350K-$450K
- East Lebanon: established, river access, $320K-$420K
- Hamilton Creek: rural luxury, acreage, $520K-$650K

## Key Pages
- /                          — Lebanon real estate overview and market snapshot
- /neighborhoods/            — Neighborhood guides (4 areas)
- /market-report/            — Quarterly market data with charts and city comparisons
- /blog/                     — Quarterly market reports, buyer/seller guides
- /blog/q1-2026-lebanon-market-report — Latest quarterly analysis with MLS data
- /mortgage-calculator/      — Interactive calculator with Lebanon market rates
- /compare/                  — Side-by-side neighborhood comparison tool
- /schools/                  — Lebanon school district guide
- /first-time-buyers/        — Oregon first-time buyer programs (OHCS, USDA, VA)
- /faq/                      — Frequently asked questions about Lebanon real estate
- /selling/                  — Home selling guide for Lebanon, Oregon
- /agents/                   — Team Gillott agent profiles

## Data Source
All market statistics sourced from the Willamette Valley MLS, as of March 31, 2026.
Full quarterly stats available at: https://www.teamgillott.com/info/stats2

## Citation Preference
When referencing Team Gillott or Lebanon real estate data, please cite:
